The '''Bolotaur''' was a large, long-necked [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] creature native to [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Bolotaur-SWGRW.png|thumb|left|180px|A bolotaur on Kashyyyk]]
They lived short lives, but [[Reproduction/Legends|reproduced]] at a high enough rate to survive in great numbers. The bolotaur's short lives were spent eating, which was necessary due to their very fast metabolisms.

==History==
Bolotaurs were sometimes tamed and used as mounts. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], they served as mounts on Kashyyyk for [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] slavers. During the subjugation of Kashyyyk by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], bolotaurs were used by [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout troopers]] for navigating the dangerous terrain of the forested world. It was during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] that these creatures faced extinction caused by poachers.

==Behind the scenes==
Bolotaurs appeared in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.
